_meta.label: Sample data — replace with official dataset.
_meta.source: Illustrative blackspots based on publicly reported accident-prone zones in and around Guwahati. Not validated against NCRB/MoRTH records.

blackspots.name: Jalukbari Flyover Approach
blackspots.primaryHazard: High-speed merging, poor night visibility, uncontrolled ramps

blackspots.name: Jorabat T-Point
blackspots.primaryHazard: Uncontrolled 3-way junction, heavy truck traffic, poor sight lines

blackspots.name: Sonapur Bridge, NH-37
blackspots.primaryHazard: Narrow bridge deck, pedestrian conflict, poor lighting, sudden narrowing

blackspots.name: Khanapara Overbridge
blackspots.primaryHazard: Pedestrians crossing at grade, high-speed traffic, no median

blackspots.name: Noonmati Refinery Crossing
blackspots.primaryHazard: Industrial vehicle cross-traffic, tanker turns, dust reducing visibility

blackspots.name: Kahilipara–Basistha Stretch
blackspots.primaryHazard: Undulating road, waterlogging in monsoon, poor drainage

blackspots.name: Azara Airport Road Intersection
blackspots.primaryHazard: Mixed traffic speeds, unregulated U-turns, two-wheelers

blackspots.name: Maligaon Railway Level Crossing
blackspots.primaryHazard: Unmanned level crossing, speeding two-wheelers ignoring gates

blackspots.name: Guwahati–Shillong Road Curve, Jorabat
blackspots.primaryHazard: Sharp hairpin, hill road with sheer drop, overloaded vehicles
